toggles.name: Connected User Experiences and Telemetry
toggles.description: Disables the DiagTrack service that sends telemetry to Microsoft

toggles.name: Diagnostic Data Collection
toggles.description: Sets diagnostic data to Security level (minimum)
toggles.whatBreaks: Windows Insider and some feedback features

toggles.name: Application Usage Tracking
toggles.description: Disables app launch tracking and recommendations
toggles.whatBreaks: Start menu app suggestions based on usage

toggles.name: Activity History
toggles.description: Disables activity history collection and upload
toggles.whatBreaks: Timeline feature and cross-device activity sync

toggles.name: Inking and Typing Data
toggles.description: Disables inking and typing data collection

toggles.name: Speech Recognition Data
toggles.description: Disables online speech recognition data collection

toggles.name: Location Tracking
toggles.description: Disables location service for the device
toggles.whatBreaks: Location-based apps (Maps, Weather, Find My Device)

toggles.name: Windows Error Reporting
toggles.description: Disables automatic error report submission
toggles.whatBreaks: Automatic crash report submission to Microsoft

toggles.name: Feedback Frequency
toggles.description: Disables feedback prompts from Windows

toggles.name: Compatibility Appraiser
toggles.description: Disables the Compatibility Appraiser scheduled task

toggles.name: OneDrive Auto-Start
toggles.description: Prevents OneDrive from starting automatically

toggles.name: Cortana
toggles.description: Disables Cortana assistant

toggles.name: Cloud Clipboard Sync
toggles.description: Disables clipboard sync across devices

toggles.name: Windows Spotlight
toggles.description: Disables Windows Spotlight lock screen content
toggles.whatBreaks: Dynamic lock screen images and suggestions

toggles.name: Connected Experiences
toggles.description: Disables Office connected experiences
toggles.whatBreaks: Some Office online features and templates

toggles.name: Advertising ID
toggles.description: Disables the per-user advertising identifier

toggles.name: Tailored Experiences
toggles.description: Disables tailored tips and recommendations

toggles.name: Start Menu Suggestions
toggles.description: Disables suggested apps in Start menu

toggles.name: Notification Ads
toggles.description: Disables tips and suggestions in notifications

toggles.name: Delivery Optimization
toggles.description: Disables peer-to-peer update delivery
toggles.whatBreaks: P2P Windows Update sharing (LAN and internet)

toggles.name: Network Connectivity Status Indicator
toggles.description: Disables NCSI active probing

toggles.name: Wi-Fi Sense
toggles.description: Disables automatic Wi-Fi hotspot sharing

toggles.name: Automatic Sample Submission
toggles.description: Disables automatic malware sample submission to Microsoft

toggles.name: Application Telemetry
toggles.description: Disables application telemetry via AITAgent

toggles.name: Device Census
toggles.description: Disables the Device Census scheduled task

toggles.name: Diagnostic Scheduled Tasks
toggles.description: Disables various diagnostic scheduled tasks
